meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop building tutorials and start building revenue. Learn how to architect high-conversion user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code today.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a symptom of poor product-led growth. By shifting focus from feature documentation to outcome-based user onboarding, you bridge the gap between registration and 'Aha!' moments. Use Antigravity to scaffold interactive flows and Claude Code to automate the integration, ensuring users experience value within their first session.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with 'getting started' guides that nobody reads. You’ve built a powerful tool, but your users are stuck in an endless loop of friction, unable to translate your features into their business success. This is the silent killer of MRR.

We are moving beyond static documentation. To scale, you must architect an onboarding flow that acts as a personalized consultant, guiding users toward their first revenue-generating milestone. This tutorial strips away the noise, giving you the engineering blueprint to turn curious sign-ups into lifetime subscribers.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that correlates with user retention. We will map this to a state-driven onboarding component.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a state machine definition for a SaaS onboarding flow that tracks user progress from signup to the first successful API key generation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate the state machine logic for onboarding based on the Antigravity schema provided.'

steps.title: Build the Interactive Checklist
steps.description: Replace static guides with a progress-tracked checklist that executes tasks directly in the user's workspace.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a dynamic React component that displays a 3-step onboarding checklist, where each step triggers an API call upon completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/components/Onboarding.tsx --prompt 'Implement the checklist component with local storage persistence.'

steps.title: Implement Context-Aware Tooltips
steps.description: Use intelligent tooltips that only trigger when a user pauses, preventing cognitive overload.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a custom hook for a 'SmartTooltip' that detects user inactivity on complex dashboard elements and prompts a tutorial overlay.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Integrate the SmartTooltip hook into the dashboard layout and ensure it triggers after 5 seconds of idle time.'

steps.title: Automate Data Seeding
steps.description: Don't let users stare at a blank dashboard. Seed their account with dummy data to showcase your product's power immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a data seeding script for the onboarding flow that populates a user dashboard with representative templates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create a seed_onboarding_data.ts utility that runs when a user hits the /dashboard route for the first time.'

steps.title: Instrument Performance Analytics
steps.description: Measure drop-off points in your onboarding flow to identify where your users get stuck.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add event tracking middleware to the onboarding flow to capture completion rates for each step using a generic analytics provider interface.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file lib/analytics.ts --prompt 'Add event tracking for onboarding steps and integrate with the existing routing logic.'

pro_tips: Never force a walkthrough; allow power users to skip the entire onboarding flow with a single click.
Use 'Empty States' as your best marketing tool; if there is no data, show a template gallery instead of a blank screen.
Monitor time-to-first-value (TTFV) as your primary metric, not just signups.
Personalize the onboarding experience by asking one high-intent question during signup and dynamically adjusting the flow.
A/B test your CTA copy within the onboarding tooltips; small changes often yield double-digit conversion growth.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, deploy a feedback loop to capture why users drop off at specific steps, then iterate on those friction points using the same Antigravity/Claude Code cycle.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your product potential go to waste. Build onboarding that converts, scale your MRR, and stop users from churning before they even start. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
